changes.old:
{'id': 'INITIAL', 'description': '费力地穿过一片厚密的灌木丛并来到空地后，一种莫名的怀旧感突然向你袭来。

那是[purple]花朵的芬芳[/purple]、[green]腐烂的恶臭[/green]以及[orange]某种无法言说的气息[/orange]的混合体。每前进一步，这股气味都变得愈发浓烈。与此同时，你感受到周围的世界正开始[sine]扭曲，旋转[/sine]。

一股[sine]变幻莫测的混沌[/rainbow][/sine]将你淹没，你开始慢慢地丧失了对自我的感知。', 'options': [{'id': 'LET_GO', 'title': '放任自流', 'description': '[gold]变化[/gold]你[gold]牌组[/gold]中的一张牌。'}, {'id': 'MAINTAIN_CONTROL', 'title': '维持理智', 'description': '[gold]升级[/gold]你[gold]牌组[/gold]中的一张牌。'}]}, {'id': 'LET_GO', 'description': '你选择了屈服，任由你的思绪[sine][purple]渐行渐远…[/purple][/sine]
你看见了自己正[blue]与朋友们谈笑风生[/blue]，[green]作为团队的一员并肩作战[/green]，[gold]与强敌生死对决[/gold]。这是梦境？还是现实？又或是两者皆有？无数双眼睛正注视着你和你的梦。它们…是谁…？

不知过了多久，你悠悠转醒。
香气转淡，随着你的意识重归清明，其影响也渐渐消散。当神志彻底稳定时，你感觉头脑从未有如此清醒过。

[sine][red]那些眼睛…究竟是什么？[/red][/sine]'}, {'id': 'MAINTAIN_CONTROL', 'description': '你抵制住了屈服的诱惑，攀上了一棵树的树梢。尽管香气无法触及此处，但其残留的影响仍如利爪般撕扯着你的心智。

维持理智并非易事；你将思绪紧紧维系在你的[blue]信条[/blue]之上。

[AromaPrinciple]
[AromaPrinciple]
[AromaPrinciple]

香气逐渐消散。'}
changes.new:
{'id': 'INITIAL', 'description': "Upon trudging through a thick underbrush and making it into a clearing, you're hit with an unplaceable nostalgia.

A mix of [purple]floral scents[/purple], [green]putrid decay[/green], and [orange]something else entirely[/orange]. The scent grows stronger with each step, and you feel as though the world around you is [sine]warping and twisting[/sine].

Overcome with a sense of [sine]shifting chaos[/rainbow][/sine], you begin to lose your sense of self.", 'options': [{'id': 'LET_GO', 'title': 'Let Go', 'description': '[gold]Transform[/gold] a card in your [gold]Deck[/gold].'}, {'id': 'MAINTAIN_CONTROL', 'title': 'Maintain Control', 'description': '[gold]Upgrade[/gold] a card in your [gold]Deck[/gold].'}]}, {'id': 'LET_GO', 'description': "You give in and your mind [sine][purple]drifts...[/purple][/sine]
You see yourself [blue]communing with friends[/blue], [green]fighting as a team[/green], and [gold]dueling great foes[/gold]. Is this a dream? Reality? Somehow both? Many sets of eyes perceive you and your dreams. Who are they...?

You awaken after an unknown amount of time.
The aroma weakens and its effects fade as you regain clarity. Upon restabilizing, you're more clearheaded than ever.

[sine][red]What were those eyes?[/red][/sine]"}, {'id': 'MAINTAIN_CONTROL', 'description': "Resisting the temptation to give in, you climb atop a tree where the aroma doesn't reach but its effects claw at your mind.

Maintaining control is difficult; you tether your thoughts to your [blue]Core Principles[/blue].

[AromaPrinciple]
[AromaPrinciple]
[AromaPrinciple]

The aroma subsides."}

紧接着，一阵突如其来的[red][jitter]剧烈刺痛[/jitter][/red]席卷而来，那是尚且存活的真菌在你体内挣扎着，走完它最后的短暂时刻。'}, {'id': 'INITIAL', 'description': '[sine]上一次吃饭是什么时候来着？
…等等，这股奇妙的香味是怎么回事？[/sine]

循着气味，你来到了一处温馨的营地，各种[green]美味的蘑菇[/green]正在火上烤着！由于实在是太饿了，你甚至完全没想过这些玩意儿安不安全。
（你饿得甚至连旁边有个死掉的冒险者这事都没注意到）', 'options': [{'id': 'BIG_MUSHROOM', 'title': '大蘑菇', 'description': 'Obtain [gold]大蘑菇[/gold]. 拾起时，将你的最大生命值提升[blue]20[/blue]。在每场战斗开始时，少抽[blue]2[/blue]张牌。'}, {'id': 'FRAGRANT_MUSHROOM', 'title': '芳香蘑菇', 'description': 'Obtain [gold]芳香蘑菇[/gold]. 拾起时，失去[red]15[/red]点生命，然后随机[gold]升级[/gold][blue]3[/blue]张牌。'}]}, {'id': 'MEDLEY', 'description': '那份[green]蘑菇拼盘[/green]看上去最诱人，于是你直接下了手。

[red][jitter][b]“我的蘑菇！！”[/b][/jitter][/red]

那个本以为已经死透了的冒险者居然跳起来攻击你！你顺手把它放倒。最终，在一抹负罪感调味下，你干掉了剩下的美食。'}
changes.new:
{'id': 'BIG_MUSHROOM', 'description': 'You bite into the [orange]Big Mushroom[/orange]. Its flesh is firm, starchy, and satisfying. The more you eat, the hungrier you become, as if the mushroom is feeding on your hunger.

[sine]So yummy... you enter a [red]food coma[/red].[/sine]
This gluttony will cost you.'}, {'id': 'FRAGRANT_MUSHROOM', 'description': 'You sample the [green]Fragrant One[/green], a small woody mushroom with a delicate scent of shellfish...

A burst of energy spurs you to run, jump, and [gold]rigorously train[/gold]!
Then, a sudden [red][jitter]stabbing pain[/jitter][/red] hits you as the living fungi struggles within you during its brief final moments.'}, {'id': 'INITIAL', 'description': "[sine]How long has it been since you ate?
...wait, what's that fantastic smell?[/sine]

Following the scent, you reach a cozy campground with all manner of [green]tasty mushrooms[/green] being cooked! You don't consider the safety of eating these mushrooms because you are so hungry.
(So hungry that you don't notice the dead adventurer)", 'options': [{'id': 'BIG_MUSHROOM', 'title': 'Big Mushroom', 'description': 'Obtain [gold]Big Mushroom[/gold]. Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by [blue]20[/blue]. At the start of each combat, draw [blue]2[/blue] fewer cards.'}, {'id': 'FRAGRANT_MUSHROOM', 'title': 'Fragrant Mushroom', 'description': 'Obtain [gold]Fragrant Mushroom[/gold]. Upon pickup, lose [red]15[/red] HP and [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]3[/blue] random cards.'}]}, {'id': 'MEDLEY', 'description': 'The [green]medley of mushrooms[/green] looks the most appetizing so you go for that.

[red][jitter]“MY MUSHROOMS!!”[/jitter][/red]

The adventurer, presumably dead, attacks you! You knock them out, and with a seasoning of guilt, finish the rest of the fine meal.'}

他们邀请你入伙，共同开启一场搜刮迷宫财富的[b]史诗级任务[/b]。身为老手，你心知肚明这迷宫里塞满了[red][jitter]致命陷阱[/jitter][/red]和[orange][sine]守卫[/sine][/orange]。

搭伙干活确实容易些，但那样你就得跟人平分战利品了。', 'options': [{'id': 'SOLO_QUEST', 'title': '独自挑战', 'description': '获得[blue]150[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。失去[red]18[/red]点生命。'}, {'id': 'JOIN_FORCES', 'title': '结伴同行', 'description': '获得[blue]50[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。'}]}, {'id': 'JOIN_FORCES', 'description': '每个人的脸上都乐开了花，包括你自己！

这是你这辈子最愉快的一次冒险，你也真的留下了[gold][sine]美好的回忆[/sine][/gold]。'}, {'id': 'SOLO_QUEST', 'description': '你带着几分厌烦，无视了他们那此刻紧蹙的眉头，径直走了过去。其中一人甚至还[jitter][purple]对着你挥了挥拳头[/purple][/jitter]。

迷宫里到处都透着恶意。你掉进过地刺陷阱，被带刺的巨型滚木迎头击中，还得一路上和那些[orange]挥舞着狼牙棒的暴躁生物[/orange]缠斗。

你简直受够了这些带刺的玩意，甚至开始考虑下次冒险是不是得向团队协作低头了。'}
changes.new:
{'id': 'INITIAL', 'description': "In a clearing, you run into a [green]Ragtag Group of Adventurers[/green] looking down and gesturing at a [purple]gigantic maze[/purple].

They offer to join forces with you in an [b]Epic Quest[/b] to loot the riches of this maze. As an experienced adventurer yourself, it's clear this maze is filled with [red][jitter]deadly traps[/jitter][/red] and [orange][sine]guardians[/sine][/orange].

It would be easier if you work together, but then you would have to split the loot.", 'options': [{'id': 'JOIN_FORCES', 'title': 'Join Forces', 'description': 'Gain [blue]50[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].'}, {'id': 'SOLO_QUEST', 'title': 'Solo Quest', 'description': 'Gain [blue]150[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Lose [red]18[/red] HP.'}]}, {'id': 'JOIN_FORCES', 'description': "Everyone's face immediately lights up, including your own!

One of the adventurers turns out to be a bard!
You merrily waltz into the maze as [aqua]Aquid the squid wizard[/aqua] effortlessly disarms traps, while you and the [red]Grathorian fighter[/red] take out the [orange]spiky club-wielding guards[/orange] with ease.

This was the most joyous adventure of your life and you've made some truly [gold][sine]Great Memories[/sine][/gold]."}, {'id': 'SOLO_QUEST', 'description': 'Feeling misanthropic, you wordlessly walk past their now-frowning faces. One of them even [jitter][purple]shakes their fist[/purple][/jitter] at you.

The maze is not welcoming. You fall into a spike trap, you are struck by a massive log with spikes, and [orange]feisty creatures with spiky clubs[/orange] fight you along the entire journey.

You are sick of spikes, and consider teamwork for the next adventure.'}

changes.new:
{'id': 'GROUP', 'description': 'You greet the chittering [aqua]Morphics[/aqua] and they embrace you into their crystally arms.

They share their combined knowledge and inject you with [sine]Morphic Magic[/sine], changing your nature... Such lovely creatures, these [aqua]Morphics[/aqua].

[red]One of them stole your[/red] [gold]gold[/gold][red].[/red]'}, {'id': 'INITIAL', 'description': 'You enter a grove of [green]crystalline trees[/green], and they begin to [jitter]quiver excitedly[/jitter]!

changes.old:
{'id': 'EAT', 'description': '你吃下了[aqua]蓝宝石种子[/aqua]，几乎一瞬间你就感觉到自己都[blue]四肢变得更加灵活[/blue]、[gold]眼中的色彩变得更加鲜艳[/gold]、而且你还能够[purple][sine]感知到附近敌人的灵魂[/sine][/purple]。

幸亏你没踩到它呢。'}, {'id': 'INITIAL', 'description': '你走路时差点踩上了一块发光的尖锐……种子？它的颜色非常明确地表明了这是一枚[aqua]蓝宝石种子[/aqua]！这些稀有种子不是应该已经灭绝了吗！？

传说里，只要吃下一粒这个种子，就能大幅[gold]强化你的体能[/gold]，但如果你把它种下然后好好养育它，又会怎么样呢？', 'options': [{'id': 'EAT', 'title': '吃下', 'description': '回复[green]9[/green]生命。[gold]升级[/gold]你[gold]牌组[/gold]中的一张牌。'}, {'id': 'PLANT', 'title': '种植培育', 'description': '给一张牌[gold]附魔[/gold]：[purple]播种[/purple]。'}]}, {'id': 'PLANT', 'description': '你在[green]密林[/green]一番寻觅，总算找到了一个[blue]通风良好[/blue]的花盆。然后你四处跋涉，寻找一个无人侵扰的地点，能让[orange]阳光从墙上的裂缝中倾泻下来[/orange]。你小心翼翼地用树皮和藤蔓将花盆加固，为它提供一些[green]迷彩遮掩[/green]，然后往里面放入了一些肥沃高营养的土壤，接着把[aqua]种子[/aqua]埋了进去。

最后，你从附近的植物上采集到了一些露水，洒在了土上。

[sine]小种子，快长大…[/sine]
你甚至没有察觉，[aqua]蓝宝石种子[/aqua]已经依附到了你的精神上。
感谢你的辛勤努力。'}
changes.new:
{'id': 'EAT', 'description': "You ingest the [aqua]Sapphire Seed[/aqua] and within moments your [blue]limbs feel more agile[/blue], [gold]colors sharpen[/gold], and you [purple][sine]sense the souls of nearby foes[/sine][/purple].

Good thing you didn't step on it."}, {'id': 'INITIAL', 'description': "You narrowly avoid stepping on a bright, sharp... seed? Its unmistakable color gives away that it's a [aqua]Sapphire Seed[/aqua]! Weren't these incredible seeds supposed to be extinct!?

Legends say that consuming one can greatly [gold]amplify your endurance[/gold], but what if you plant and nourish it instead?", 'options': [{'id': 'EAT', 'title': 'Consume', 'description': 'Heal [green]9[/green] HP. [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a card in your [gold]Deck[/gold].'}, {'id': 'PLANT', 'title': 'Plant and Nourish', 'description': '[gold]Enchant[/gold] a card with [purple]Sown[/purple].'}]}, {'id': 'PLANT', 'description': 'You scour the [green]Overgrowth[/green] and find a pot with [blue]good aeration[/blue]. Then, you trek around, searching for an untouched spot where [orange]light peeks through a cracked wall[/orange]. Carefully, you reinforce the pot with bark and vine to [green]camouflage[/green] it, fill it with loamy, nutrient-rich soil, and nestle the [aqua]seed[/aqua] just beneath the surface.

Finally, you gather dew from nearby plants and pour it over the soil.

[sine]Grow big, little seed...[/sine]
Unknowingly, the [aqua]Sapphire Seed[/aqua] attaches to you spiritually.
Thankful of your hard work.'}

You should really sleep more."}, {'id': 'REST', 'description': 'All this adventuring has left you exhausted, and despite the oddities, you decide to sleep.

You wake up, recovered, but not replenished.'}
